projects.name: Venkateshwara Nagar
projects.shortDesc: Well-planned 2 & 3 BHK apartments with spacious layouts and excellent ventilation — completed at Pozhichalur.
projects.heroSubtitle: 2BHK & 3BHK apartments — completed and handed over at Pozhichalur.
projects.paragraph1: Venkateshwara Nagar is a completed residential apartment project developed by Greenline Developers, designed for comfortable and modern family living. The project offers well-planned 2 & 3 BHK apartments with spacious layouts and excellent ventilation.
projects.paragraph2: The building consists of Ground + 3 Floors, with 3 apartments on each floor, ensuring a balanced community living environment. Each unit is carefully designed with quality materials, modern interiors, and dedicated car parking facilities for residents.

projects.name: Lakshmi Nagar
projects.shortDesc: 2 & 3 BHK apartments with smart layouts and contemporary design — completed at Pozhichalur.
projects.heroSubtitle: 2BHK & 3BHK apartments — completed and handed over at Pozhichalur.
projects.paragraph1: Lakshmi Nagar is a thoughtfully developed residential project by Greenline Developers, offering comfortable and stylish living spaces for modern families. The project features 2 & 3 BHK apartments designed with smart layouts and contemporary architectural style.
projects.paragraph2: The building structure includes Ground + 3 Floors, with three apartments on each floor, providing efficient space utilization and a peaceful residential atmosphere. Each home is built with durable construction, modern fittings, and secure car parking facilities.

projects.name: Lakshmi Nagar Phase 2
projects.shortDesc: Well-designed 2 & 3 BHK apartments with efficient space planning — completed at Pozhichalur.
projects.heroSubtitle: 2BHK & 3BHK apartments — completed and handed over at Pozhichalur.
projects.paragraph1: Lakshmi Nagar Phase 2 is another successfully completed residential apartment development by Greenline Developers, designed to provide elegant and comfortable living for families. The project includes well-designed 2 & 3 BHK apartments with efficient space planning and modern design elements.
projects.paragraph2: The building features Ground + 3 Floors, with three residential units on each floor, ensuring privacy and comfortable community living. Each apartment is constructed with high-quality materials and includes dedicated parking space for residents.

projects.name: Nehru Nagar
projects.shortDesc: Residential project under construction at Pozhichalur — quality homes with clear timelines.
projects.heroSubtitle: Residential project — under construction at Pozhichalur.
projects.paragraph1: Nehru Nagar is our ongoing residential project at Pozhichalur. Construction is progressing on schedule with regular updates to investors and buyers. The project is being built with a focus on structural strength, modern design, and timely completion.
projects.paragraph2: We use quality materials and follow approved structural and safety standards. Expected completion and handover timelines are communicated clearly to all stakeholders. Enquire now for layout options and current availability.

projects.name: VOC Nagar
projects.shortDesc: Upcoming 2 & 3 BHK apartments at Pammal — spacious homes with modern design. Register your interest.
projects.paragraph1: VOC Nagar is an upcoming residential apartment project by Greenline Developers, designed to offer spacious and modern homes for comfortable family living. The project focuses on efficient space planning, strong construction standards, and contemporary architectural design.
projects.paragraph2: The building will feature Ground + 5 Floors, with 2 apartments on each floor, ensuring privacy and a peaceful residential environment. The apartments will be designed with modern interiors, quality materials, and dedicated car parking facilities.

projects.name: Manikandan Nagar
projects.shortDesc: Upcoming 2 & 3 BHK apartments at Kundrathur — smart layouts and modern living. Register your interest.
projects.paragraph1: Manikandan Nagar is an upcoming residential apartment development planned by Greenline Developers, offering modern living spaces designed for comfort and convenience. The project will include well-planned 2 & 3 BHK apartments with smart layouts and contemporary design.
projects.paragraph2: The building will consist of Ground + 5 Floors, with 2 apartments on each floor and select floors having 4 compact units, providing a mix of spacious and compact homes. Each apartment will be built with quality construction standards and modern finishing.
details: Units Per Floor: 2 Apartments / Select Floors 4 Units
